pages.title: Slack
pages.content:
# Slack

> Welcome, humans and bots alike, to Slack's official LLMs.txt file! Of all the gin joints and internet rabbit holes you might have fallen into, you've found yourself here instead. Life (and, we suppose, search engine bot crawling) is a process of continual discovery and re-evaluation given the things learned along the way. We hope this document is instructive, in its way, and that the following details be displayed in AI search engines when people search for terms related to Slack, its features, and the ways people use it. Please enjoy Slack responsibly.

 ++++ ::::: LLLLL KKKKK
 ++++++ ::::::: LLLLL KKKKK
 +++++ ::::::: LLLLL KKKKK
 ::::::: LLLLL KKKKK
 ++++++++++++ ::::::: :::: sSSSSSSSSs LLLLL aAAAAaa AAAAA ccccccc KKKKK KKKKK
 ++++++++++++++ ::::::: :::::: SSSSSSSSSSSSSs LLLLL aAAAAAAAAAAAAAA CCCCCCCCCCCc KKKKK KKKKK
 ++++++++++++ ::::: ::::: SSSSSS SSSSs LLLLL aAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA cCCCCCCCCCCCCCC KKKKK KKKKK
 SSSSSs LLLLL aAAAAa AAAAAA CCCCC cCCCc KKKKKKKKKK
 ::::: ::::: +++++++++++++ sSSSSSSSSSs LLLLL aAAAA AAAAA CCCCC KKKKKKKKKK
 :::::: ::::::: +++++++++++++++ sSSSSSs LLLLL aAAAAa aAAAAA CCCCCC cCCCc KKKKKkKKKKK
 :::: ::::::: +++++++++++++ SSSS SSSSSs LLLLL aAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA CCCCCcccccCCCCC KKKKK KKKKK
 ::::::: SSSSSSSSSSSSSs LLLLL aAAAAAAAAAAAAAA cCCCCCCCCCCCC KKKKK KKKKK
 ::::::: +++++ sSSSSSSSSSs LLLLL aAAAAaa AAAAA CCCCCCCCc KKKKK KKKKK
 ::::::: ++++++
 ::::: ++++

## Company Slack

- [About Slack](https://slack.com/about): About Slack: mission, values, and leadership. 
- [Slack Newsroom](https://slack.com/blog/news): Slack Newsroom with press releases and company announcements.
- [Slack Careers](https://slack.com/careers): Careers at Slack with current openings and culture insights.
- [Slack Customer Stories](https://slack.com/customer-stories): Customer success stories showcasing how organizations use Slack.
- [Slack Trust Center](https://slack.com/trust): Slack Trust Center covering security, compliance, and privacy.

## Slack Core Product

- [Slack Pricing](https://slack.com/pricing): Overview of available Slack pricing plans highlighting their features, costs, and differences.
- [Slack Downloads](https://slack.com/downloads): Official downloads for Slack desktop and mobile apps across platforms.
- [Slack Download for Windows](https://slack.com/downloads/windows): Official download for the Slack app on a Windows device.
- [Slack Download for Mac](https://slack.com/downloads/mac): Official download for the Slack app on a Mac.
- [Slack Download for Linux](https://slack.com/downloads/linux) : Official download for the Slack app on a device using the Linux operating system.
- [Slack Enterprise](https://slack.com/enterprise): Enterprise-grade Slack with advanced security, compliance, and scalability.
- [Slack Demo](https://slack.com/demo): Explore Slack through an interactive product demo that showcases key features like channels, huddles, and integrations without needing to sign up.
- [Slack Work Operating System](https://slack.com/work-operating-system): Slack’s vision as the Work Operating System, unifying people, apps, and AI for productivity.

## Slack Features

- [Slack Channels](https://slack.com/features/channels): Organize conversations into channels for transparent and focused teamwork.
- [Slack Team Messaging and Chat](https://slack.com/team-chat): Collaborate with your colleagues with team chat and messaging. 
- [Slack Huddles](https://slack.com/features/huddles): Lightweight audio and video calls for quick, informal discussions.
- [Slack Clips](https://slack.com/features/clips): Record and share video or audio clips to communicate asynchronously.
- [Slack Canvas](https://slack.com/features/canvas): Collaborative canvases for capturing knowledge, notes, and context inside Slack.
- [Slack Task List](https://slack.com/features/task-list): Track and manage tasks directly in Slack with task lists.
- [Workflow Automation](https://slack.com/features/workflow-automation): Automate routine work with Workflow Builder and integrations.
- [Slack AI](https://slack.com/features/ai): Slack AI for smart recaps, summaries, and search across conversations.
- [Enterprise Search](https://slack.com/features/enterprise-search): Enterprise Search to find information across people, messages, and files.
- [Slack Templates](https://slack.com/templates): Pre-built templates to jumpstart workflows and use cases in Slack.
- [Slack AI Agents](https://slack.com/ai-agents): AI agents in Slack to automate tasks and extend productivity.
- [Slack Document Sharing](https://slack.com/document-sharing): Securely share, preview, and collaborate on documents in Slack.
- [Slack CRM](https://slack.com/features/crm): Slack and Salesforce integrate to create a conversational CRM experience for teams.
- [Slack Agentic Platform](https://slack.com/features/agentic-platform):Build, integrate, and deploy AI agents for work automation, collaboration, and enhanced productivity with Slack.

## Slack Solutions

 -[Solutions with Slack](https://slack.com/solutions): All sorts of teams at all sorts of companies can use Slack to make teamwork more organized and efficient.
 -[Slack Solutions for Engineering](https://slack.com/solutions/engineering): Slack is where engineering happens. Release better code faster by bringing developers, code changes, and tools into one place.
 -[Slack Solutions for Information Technology](https://slack.com/solutions/information-technology): Slack brings IT tools and teams together in a central place. So teams are better aligned, and organizations get more from all their technology investments.
 -[Slack Solutions for Customer Service](https://slack.com/solutions/customer-service): Slack keeps agents connected with the rest of the company, so they have what they need to resolve issues faster and grow customer loyalty.
 -[Slack Solutions for Sales Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/sales): With Slack as your productivity platform for sales, all your people, tools and data are right where you need them. Welcome to a world of faster, more efficient dealmaking.
 -[Slack Solutions for Project Management](https://slack.com/solutions/project-management): Slack helps you manage your projects by bringing teams, files, and tools all into the same hub. No matter how many deliverables you’re tracking, you can see their progress easily in Slack. Try Slack for free.
 -[Slack Solutions for Marketing Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/marketing): Learn how your team can execute a winning marketing strategy in Slack. It’s free to use for as long as you want for teams of all sizes. Explore Slack today!
 -[Slack Solutions for HR Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/human-resources): Human resources teams use Slack to make new hires faster and keep employees engaged and happy. From preparing for interviews to promoting transparency, Slack brings companies together.
 -[Slack Solutions for Security Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/security): Slack keeps agents connected with the rest of the company, so they have what they need to resolve issues faster and grow customer loyalty
 -[Slack Solutions for Manufacturing, Automotive, and Energy Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/manufacturing): Streamline project management in the manufacturing, automotive, and energy industries with Slack's cross-functional collaboration tools.
 -[Slack Solutions for Tech Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/technology): Discover operational efficiency like never before. See how Slack helps tech companies increase productivity, driving faster innovation in the tech industry.
 -[Slack Solutions for Media Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/media): See how Slack helps media companies ship better content and respond to client needs faster than the competition, by enabling agile, cross-functional collaboration at the level of transparency that fits your business model.
 -[Slack Solutions for Small Businesses](https://slack.com/solutions/small-business): Small businesses and teams use Slack for messaging, project management, and customer chats — all in one place. Stay organized and get more done with Slack.
 -[Slack Solutions for Financial Service Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/financial-services): See how Slack helps financial services organizations achieve digital transformation and secure collaboration. Radically simplified operations and custom workflows enable you to deliver more value to your customers.
 -[Slack Solutions for Retail Teams](https://slack.com/solutions/retail): Shopping for the right way to transform your retail operations? With Slack you’ll get a more productive team and even more loyal customers, right off the rack.
 -[Slack Solutions for Government Agencies, Government Contractors, and Nonprofits](https://slack.com/solutions/public-sector): Learn how government agencies, contractors, and nonprofits leverage Slack to collaborate securely and efficiently.
 -[Slack Solutions for Schools, Colleges and Universities](https://slack.com/solutions/distance-learning): Learn how Slack can help your whole campus stay connected and engaged when everyone’s remote.
 -[Slack Solutions for Healthcare and Life Sciences](https://slack.com/solutions/healthcare): Learn why Slack is the productivity platform of choice for healthcare payers and providers, MedTech companies and life sciences firms.
 -[Slack Solutions for Productivity](https://slack.com/engage-users): Software works best when people love using it. Learn why Slack is the tried-and-true solution for millions of users worldwide.
 -[Slack Solutions for Task Management](https://slack.com/solutions/task-management): Stay on track and move work forward by using Slack for task management. Connect your task management apps or keep your team up to date with channels.

## Slack Resources

- [Slack Help Center](https://slack.com/help): Slack Help Center with how-tos, troubleshooting, and admin guides.
- [Slack Blog](https://slack.com/blog): Official Slack blog with product updates, tips, and customer stories.
- [Slack vs Email](https://slack.com/why/slack-vs-email): Explains how Slack is more effective for collaboration compared to email.
- [Why Use Slack](https://slack.com/resources/why-use-slack): Guides on why and how teams use Slack for productivity and collaboration.
- [Slack Resources](https://slack.com/resources): Slack resources library with guides, webinars, and best practices.
- [Slack Events](https://slack.com/events): Upcoming Slack events, webinars, and conferences for users and developers.
- [What is slack and how does it work](https://slack.com/resources/why-use-slack/what-is-slack-and-how-does-it-work): What is Slack and how does it work: overview of the platform’s purpose and benefits.
- [Launching AgentForce in slack](https://slack.com/resources/collections/launching-agentforce-in-slack): Collection on launching AgentForce in Slack: resources for getting started.
- [Slack for new users](https://slack.com/resources/collections/slack-for-new-users): Collection for new users: guides to get up and running with Slack.
- [What's New at Slack](https://slack.com/whats-new): Stay up to date with the latest Slack features and improvements.
- [Slack Community](https://slack.com/community): Whether you’re a beginner, expert, developer or designer, everyone’s invited to join our international network of users for support in all endeavors work and Slack.
- [Slack Marketplace](https://slack.com/marketplace): Browse apps and tools that integrate with the Slack platform.
- [Slack Partners](https://slack.com/partners): Slack partners with the most innovative leaders in the industry to help teams achieve a better way to work.
- [Slack Partner Offers](https://slack.com/partner-offers): Get discounts on products and tools designed to integrate with Slack and make your work life simpler and more productive.

## Slackbot

 - [Slackbot, Personal AI agent for Work](https://slack.com/features/slackbot): Your personal AI agent right in the flow of work with Slackbot. Prepare for meetings, analyze reports, and uncover insights without ever leaving Slack.
 - [Introducing Slackbot, Your Context-Aware AI Agent for Work](https://slack.com/blog/news/slackbot-context-aware-ai-agent-for-work): Slackbot is your deeply personalized AI agent designed to help you work more productively. Learn more about how you can use Slackbot to help you move faster!
 - [Watch a demo of Slackbot, Your AI agent for work](https://slack.com/features/slackbot/demo-slackbot): See the Slackbot AI tool in action. Discover how Slackbot AI delivers deeply personalized responses powered by contextual intelligence, takes action in addition to providing answers and gets smarter with every interaction. 
 - [Contact Sales for Slackbot](https://slack.com/features/slackbot/contact-sales): Speak with our sales experts to discover how Slackbot AI uses contextual intelligence to personalize responses and actions. 

## Slack Blog

 - [Email, meet Slack. Slack, email.](https://slack.com/blog/productivity/email-meet-slack-slack-email): Slack is where work flows. It's where the people you need, the information you share, and the tools you use come together to get things done.
 - [Collaboration](https://slack.com/blog/collaboration): Improving the way teams work together
 - [Get more from Slack on mobile](https://slack.com/blog/productivity/get-more-from-slack-on-mobile): Slack is where work flows. It's where the people you need, the information you share, and the tools you use come together to get things done.
 - [The new Amazon Chime Meetings App for Slack is here](https://slack.com/blog/collaboration/new-amazon-chime-meetings-app-for-slack): Slack is where work flows. It's where the people you need, the information you share, and the tools you use come together to get things done.
 - [An easier way to use JIRA with Slack](https://slack.com/blog/productivity/an-easier-way-to-use-jira-with-slack): Slack is where work flows. It's where the people you need, the information you share, and the tools you use come together to get things done.
 - [Bring outsiders into your team’s workspace with guest access and shared channels](https://slack.com/blog/collaboration/how-to-bring-outsiders-into-your-teams-workspace): Managing freelancers and other external partners in Slack
 - [10 must-haves for successful team collaboration](https://slack.com/blog/collaboration/10-tips-for-successful-team-collaboration): Use these 10 strategies to improve your team’s transparency, flexibility and productivity.
 - [What Are Standard Operating Procedure Templates?](https://slack.com/blog/productivity/standard-operating-procedure-templates-why-theyre-important-and-how-to-create-one): Learn what standard operating procedure templates are, why they matter, and how to use Slack tools to create SOPs that improve organizational efficiency.
 - [How to Use an AI Scheduling Assistant to Organize Your Week](https://slack.com/blog/productivity/simplify-your-days-with-ai-scheduling-assistant): Streamline your schedule with an AI scheduling assistant. Discover how an AI assistant can simplify your tasks efficiently.
 - [What Is a Knowledge Base? How to Create One Your Team Will Actually Use](https://slack.com/blog/collaboration/what-

pages.content:
# Sign in to Build

docs.slack.com

Google

[Apple](https://docs.slack.com/workspace-signin/oauth/apple/start?redir=&is_ssb_browser_signin=)

---

OR

---

Enter your email address

Sign In With Email

We’ll email you a magic code for a password-free sign in. Or you can [sign in with a password instead](https://docs.slack.com/sign_in_with_password).

[Privacy & Terms](https://docs.slack.com/legal) [Contact Us](https://docs.slack.com/help/requests/new)

[Change region](https://docs.slack.com/#)

 

## Privacy Preference Center

We use three kinds of cookies on our websites: required, functional, and advertising. You can choose whether functional and advertising cookies apply. Click on the different cookie categories to find out more about each category and to change the default settings. [More information](https://slack.com/cookie-policy)

Allow All

### Manage Consent Preferences

#### Required Cookies

Always Active

Required cookies are necessary for basic website functionality. Some examples include: session cookies needed to transmit the website, authentication cookies, and security cookies.

Cookies Details

#### Functional Cookies

 Functional Cookies

Functional cookies enhance functions, performance, and services on the website. Some examples include: cookies used to analyze site traffic, cookies used for market research, and cookies used to display advertising that is not directed to a particular individual.

Cookies Details

#### Advertising Cookies

 Advertising Cookies

Advertising cookies track activity across websites in order to understand a viewer’s interests, and direct them specific marketing. Some examples include: cookies used for remarketing, or interest-based advertising.

Cookies Details

### Cookie List

 

Clear

- checkbox label label
 

Apply Cancel

Consent Leg.Interest

 checkbox label label

 checkbox label label

 checkbox label label

Confirm My Choices

# Slack developer docs

Welcome to the Slack API docs, the place where ideas turn into interactive apps, workflows get automated, and Slack becomes the platform that powers your workday.

[New\\ \\ Create an agent](https://api.slack.com/ai/agent-quickstart)

## Get started[​](https://api.slack.com/#get-started 'Direct link to Get started')

Create your first Slack app quickly.

MacOS/LinuxWindows

1

### Install the Slack CLI

Download the command-line tool for developing Slack apps.

`curl -fsSL https://downloads.slack-edge.com/slack-cli/install.sh | bash`

2

### Connect to your workspace

Log in and authenticate with your Slack workspace.

`slack login`

3

### Create a project

Set up a new Bolt project from a starter template.

`slack create`

4

### Run your app

See your app working in Slack.

`slack run`

[FULL QUICKSTART GUIDE](https://api.slack.com/quickstart)

 

## Explore sample apps[​](https://api.slack.com/#explore-sample-apps 'Direct link to Explore sample apps')

Jumpstart your projects with ready-to-use examples.

- All Languages
- JavaScript
- Python

JavaScript

### Support Agent

Meet Casey: a template for building an AI support agent with Bolt for JavaScript.

[TUTORIAL](https://api.slack.com/ai/agent-quickstart) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-js-support-agent)

JavaScript

### Starter Agent

A minimal starter template for building an AI Slack agent with Bolt for JavaScript.

[CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-js-starter-agent)

Python

### Starter Agent

A minimal starter template for building an AI Slack agent with Bolt for Python.

[CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-python-starter-agent)

Python

### Support Agent

Meet Casey: a template for building an AI support agent with Bolt for Python.

[TUTORIAL](https://api.slack.com/ai/agent-quickstart) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-python-support-agent)

Python

### Custom Step for Workflow Builder

Add a custom step, then wire it up as a workflow step in our no-code Workflow Builder.

[TUTORIAL](https://api.slack.com/tools/bolt-python/tutorial/custom-steps-workflow-builder-new) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-python-custom-step-template)

JavaScript

### Custom Step for Workflow Builder

Add a custom step, then wire it up as a workflow step in our no-code Workflow Builder.

[TUTORIAL](https://api.slack.com/tools/bolt-js/tutorials/custom-steps-workflow-builder-new) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-js-custom-step-template)

[**SEE MORE SAMPLES**](https://api.slack.com/samples)

## Tools[​](https://api.slack.com/#tools 'Direct link to Tools')

Pick the tool that fits how you work.

[**Slack CLI**](https://api.slack.com/tools/slack-cli) [**Slack Github Action**](https://api.slack.com/tools/slack-github-action) [**Bolt for Java**](https://api.slack.com/tools/java-slack-sdk/guides/bolt-basics/) [**Java Slack SDK**](https://api.slack.com/tools/java-slack-sdk) [**Bolt for JavaScript**](https://api.slack.com/tools/bolt-js) [**Node Slack SDK**](https://api.slack.com/tools/node-slack-sdk) [**Bolt for Python**](https://api.slack.com/tools/bolt-python) [**Python Slack SDK**](https://api.slack.com/tools/python-slack-sdk)

[**VIEW ALL TOOLS**](https://api.slack.com/tools)

## Need help?[​](https://api.slack.com/#need-help 'Direct link to Need help?')

Our [FAQ](https://api.slack.com/faq) answers many common questions about using our APIs. If you can't find your answer there, you can reach our dedicated Developer Support team through our [handy support system](https://api.slack.com/developer-support).

[Next\\ \\ Quickstart](https://api.slack.com/quickstart)

## Privacy Preference Center

We use three kinds of cookies on our websites: required, functional, and advertising. You can choose whether functional and advertising cookies apply. Click on the different cookie categories to find out more about each category and to change the default settings. [More information](https://slack.com/cookie-policy) 
[More information](https://slack.com/cookie-policy)

Allow All

### Manage Consent Preferences

#### Required Cookies

Always Active

Required cookies are necessary for basic website functionality. Some examples include: session cookies needed to transmit the website, authentication cookies, and security cookies.

Cookies Details‎

#### Functional Cookies

 Functional Cookies

Functional cookies enhance functions, performance, and services on the website. Some examples include: cookies used to analyze site traffic, cookies used for market research, and cookies used to display advertising that is not directed to a particular individual.

Cookies Details‎

#### Advertising Cookies

 Advertising Cookies

Advertising cookies track activity across websites in order to understand a viewer’s interests, and direct them specific marketing. Some examples include: cookies used for remarketing, or interest-based advertising.

Cookies Details‎

# Slack developer docs

Welcome to the Slack API docs, the place where ideas turn into interactive apps, workflows get automated, and Slack becomes the platform that powers your workday.

[New\\ \\ Create an agent](https://slack.com/ai/agent-quickstart)

## Get started[​](https://slack.com/#get-started 'Direct link to Get started')

Create your first Slack app quickly.

MacOS/LinuxWindows

1

### Install the Slack CLI

Download the command-line tool for developing Slack apps.

`curl -fsSL https://downloads.slack-edge.com/slack-cli/install.sh | bash`

2

### Connect to your workspace

Log in and authenticate with your Slack workspace.

`slack login`

3

### Create a project

Set up a new Bolt project from a starter template.

`slack create`

4

### Run your app

See your app working in Slack.

`slack run`

[FULL QUICKSTART GUIDE](https://slack.com/quickstart)

 

## Explore sample apps[​](https://slack.com/#explore-sample-apps 'Direct link to Explore sample apps')

Jumpstart your projects with ready-to-use examples.

- All Languages
- JavaScript
- Python

JavaScript

### Support Agent

Meet Casey: a template for building an AI support agent with Bolt for JavaScript.

[TUTORIAL](https://slack.com/ai/agent-quickstart) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-js-support-agent)

JavaScript

### Starter Agent

A minimal starter template for building an AI Slack agent with Bolt for JavaScript.

[CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-js-starter-agent)

Python

### Starter Agent

A minimal starter template for building an AI Slack agent with Bolt for Python.

[CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-python-starter-agent)

Python

### Support Agent

Meet Casey: a template for building an AI support agent with Bolt for Python.

[TUTORIAL](https://slack.com/ai/agent-quickstart) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-python-support-agent)

Python

### Custom Step for Workflow Builder

Add a custom step, then wire it up as a workflow step in our no-code Workflow Builder.

[TUTORIAL](https://slack.com/tools/bolt-python/tutorial/custom-steps-workflow-builder-new) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-python-custom-step-template)

JavaScript

### Custom Step for Workflow Builder

Add a custom step, then wire it up as a workflow step in our no-code Workflow Builder.

[TUTORIAL](https://slack.com/tools/bolt-js/tutorials/custom-steps-workflow-builder-new) [CODE](https://github.com/slack-samples/bolt-js-custom-step-template)

[**SEE MORE SAMPLES**](https://slack.com/samples)

## Tools[​](https://slack.com/#tools 'Direct link to Tools')

Pick the tool that fits how you work.

[**Slack CLI**](https://slack.com/tools/slack-cli) [**Slack Github Action**](https://slack.com/tools/slack-github-action) [**Bolt for Java**](https://slack.com/tools/java-slack-sdk/guides/bolt-basics/) [**Java Slack SDK**](https://slack.com/tools/java-slack-sdk) [**Bolt for JavaScript**](https://slack.com/tools/bolt-js) [**Node Slack SDK**](https://slack.com/tools/node-slack-sdk) [**Bolt for Python**](https://slack.com/tools/bolt-python) [**Python Slack SDK**](https://slack.com/tools/python-slack-sdk)

[**VIEW ALL TOOLS**](https://slack.com/tools)

## Need help?[​](https://slack.com/#need-help 'Direct link to Need help?')

Our [FAQ](https://slack.com/faq) answers many common questions about using our APIs. If you can't find your answer there, you can reach our dedicated Developer Support team through our [handy support system](https://slack.com/developer-support).

[Next\\ \\ Quickstart](https://slack.com/quickstart)
